title: frontend: themes: Replace deprecated MediaQueryList listener methods
author: YadavAkhileshh

findings.description: Missing SubArea in commit subject; should be 'frontend: themes: Replace deprecated MediaQueryList listener methods'.
Legacy fallback addListener/removeListener calls may still trigger ESLint; verify CI lint passes or add targeted eslint-disable with justification.
Add a test case exercising the legacy addListener/removeListener fallback path.
typeof mql.addEventListener === 'function' guard prevents TypeError in legacy WebViews.
Test verifies handler identity for both addEventListener and removeEventListener calls.
